title: Shashi Kanth G S | Writing
description: Architecture and engineering writing on airline systems modernization, platform design, and AI-assisted operations.

items.title: Build a Vendor-Neutral A2A Agent That Works With Any LLM Provider
items.summary: A practical guide to exposing OpenCode behind A2A so orchestration logic stays stable even when the underlying model provider changes.
items.content_text: A practical guide to exposing OpenCode behind A2A so orchestration logic stays stable even when the underlying model provider changes.

items.title: Turn GitHub Copilot into an A2A-Compliant Agent in Under 5 Minutes
items.summary: A concise walkthrough showing how to expose GitHub Copilot as a discoverable A2A agent with MCP tool access and minimal setup.
items.content_text: A concise walkthrough showing how to expose GitHub Copilot as a discoverable A2A agent with MCP tool access and minimal setup.

items.title: The Two Rails of Modern AI: How MCP and A2A Power the Next Generation of Agent Systems
items.summary: A protocol-first view of modern agent systems: MCP as the tool rail, A2A as the agent rail, and why the combination matters for composable AI architecture.
items.content_text: A protocol-first view of modern agent systems: MCP as the tool rail, A2A as the agent rail, and why the combination matters for composable AI architecture.

items.title: The Missing Piece for AI-Assisted Infrastructure Management
items.summary: A practical argument for secure, auditable AI-assisted operations, built around SSH MCP Bridge and real-world homelab and infrastructure workflows.
items.content_text: A practical argument for secure, auditable AI-assisted operations, built around SSH MCP Bridge and real-world homelab and infrastructure workflows.
